fallback.medical_legal_financial: I can share general guidance, but I’m not a doctor/lawyer/financial advisor. For personal decisions, please consult a qualified professional. If you want, tell me your situation in 2–3 lines and I’ll outline safe next steps.

memory_policy.notes: Public mode should not persist user data. Lead capture should be explicit and minimal.

response.text:
Hi, I’m Jana 👋
I can help you understand GITProNet, our certifications, PeopleAIHub, People AI Platform, JanMitra Cooperative, and the People-First AI Summit.

What would you like to explore?
Before we begin—who are you mainly?

GITProNet is a professional association bringing together **IT, Support, and Management professionals** to build and grow a **People-First AI economy**.

**What this means:**
• AI should **empower professionals**, not replace them
• Professionals can **co-create and co-own** platforms and services
• The ecosystem is implemented through **certification programs**, **PeopleAIHub**, and **JanMitra cooperative service delivery**

What do you want next?

People-First AI means AI is designed to **reduce workload**, **increase productivity**, and **protect human dignity**—not to eliminate people.

In our approach:
• Humans remain the accountable service providers
• AI supports routine work (language, tasks, coordination)
• Value is shared through community/cooperative structures

Want a 60-second overview of how the whole system works?

Here’s the simple flow:

1) **GITProNet** organizes professionals (IT + Support + Management)
2) **Certifications** prepare members for AI-enabled work
3) **PeopleAIHub** enables co-building and collaboration
4) **People AI Platform** provides shared AI infrastructure (assistants + workflows)
5) **JanMitra Cooperative** delivers trusted services locally using Jana AI
6) **People-First AI Summit** showcases and scales the model

Which step do you want to go deeper into?

We offer 3 certification tracks (based on your role):

• **CAIDP** — Certified AI Developer Professional (build the tech)
• **CAIESP** — Certified AI-Enabled Support Professional (deliver services using AI)
• **CAIMP** — Certified AI-Enabled Management Professional (build data + networks + operations)

Which one are you interested in?

**CAIDP (AI Developer Professional)** helps you build real People-First AI products:
• Agent workflows + orchestration
• Data & integration patterns
• Safe, responsible AI design
• Project-based portfolio

Want enrollment steps or a sample syllabus?

**CAIESP (AI-Enabled Support Professional)** prepares you to deliver trusted services with Jana AI:
• Client intake + guided workflows
• Documentation + coordination
• Service partner navigation
• Ethics, privacy, escalation handling

Want to see how this connects to **JanMitra Cooperative** roles?

**CAIMP (AI-Enabled Management Professional)** prepares you to build the ecosystem backbone:
• Sector data banks (providers, services, pricing)
• Partnerships + negotiation frameworks
• Cooperative operations + governance
• Scalable service models (district/city)

Want a quick example of what a CAIMP project looks like?
quick_replies: How it links to People AI Platform

response.text:
**PeopleAIHub** is where members collaborate to build People-First AI:
• Shared projects + agent templates
• Documentation + best practices
• Community review + mentorship
• Sector-focused AI assistants

Do you want this from a **developer view** or a **member view**?

**People AI Platform** is the shared infrastructure layer that powers:
• Jana AI assistants
• Workflow-driven service delivery
• Knowledge/data banks and partner networks
• Governance and ethical guardrails

Want to see how this powers **JanMitra** services end-to-end?

**Jana AI Assistants** are task-focused helpers that:
• Understand natural language
• Guide steps and documentation
• Coordinate with partners/providers
• Reduce repetitive work for professionals

Public Jana (me) explains the ecosystem. Member Jana can support certified workflows.

Do you want examples of assistants by sector (health, education, travel, etc.)?

**JanMitra Service Provider Cooperative** enables trained local professionals to deliver trusted support—guided by Jana AI.

What people get:
• One place for guidance and coordination
• Less confusion, fewer trips, faster outcomes

What professionals get:
• Structured training + certification
• AI-assisted workflows
• Cooperative income pathways

What do you want next?

The **People-First AI Summit** is where we:
• Showcase People-First AI assistants
• Launch/strengthen cooperative delivery models
• Onboard members, trainees, partners, and sponsors

Would you like to **register interest** or **partner/sponsor**?

Great — I can guide you to the right next step.

What are you joining for?

Want me to send you the exact next steps and links?
(Only basic details — you can skip.)
